input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.11 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.11
            TITLE: tractive system (ev only)

            CONTENT:
            rule F.11: TRACTIVE SYSTEM (EV ONLY)
F.11 TRACTIVE SYSTEM (EV ONLY) 
Tractive System Location and Protection are subject to approval during SES review and 
Technical Inspection.

final_answer: Tractive System Location and Protection are subject to approval during SES review and Technical Inspection.
